sections.subtitle: An Authentic Lijiang Ecotour Beyond the Crowds
sections.text: Escape to hidden temples, pristine wetlands, and authentic Yi village life beyond the tourist crowds. A private journey through Naxi heritage and untamed nature.

items.title: What's Special
items.subtitle: Cultural Immersion
items.highlight: Fuguo Temple, Wenhai Wetlands & Yi Village Stay

items.title: Location
items.subtitle: Jade Dragon Snow Mountain
items.highlight: Jade Dragon Snow Mountain Nature Reserve | Altitudes 2,400-3,300m

items.title: Fuguo Buddhist Temple
items.subtitle: Fuguo Tibetan Buddhist Temple
items.text: Discover the hidden serenity of Fuguo Tibetan Buddhist Temple. This secluded sanctuary offers an authentic spiritual experience, inviting you to find tranquility and immerse yourself in the peaceful atmosphere of Tibetan Buddhism.

items.title: Wenhai Wetlands
items.subtitle: Wenhai Wetland Nature Reserve
items.text: Stop by at Wenhai Wetland Nature Reserve and uncover its pristine beauty. This hidden ecological haven allows you to witness authentic wetland biodiversity in peaceful solitude, experiencing the unspoiled natural wonders of this gem.

items.title: Yi Village Experience
items.subtitle: Runangu Village
items.text: Venture to Runangu Village and experience authentic Yi minority culture and hospitality. Enjoy a genuine cultural immersion, sharing a delicious local lunch in the village chief's home and connecting with the warm spirit of the Yi people.

items.title: Ranger Patrol Hike
items.subtitle: Jade Dragon Snow Mountain
items.text: Embark on an exclusive conservation patrol hike in a secluded area of Jade Dragon Snow Mountain Nature Reserve. This unique experience allows you to witness the raw beauty of the mountain in a quieter setting and contribute to its preservation.

image.altText: Conservation patrol hike in Jade Dragon Snow Mountain

items.title: Rich Biodiversity
items.subtitle: Untouched Nature
items.text: Delve into the rich biodiversity of Lijiang in its untouched corners. Explore pristine areas to gain a deeper understanding of the region's ecology and witness Yunnan's incredible natural heritage in its authentic state.

items.title: Baisha Village
items.subtitle: Baisha Village
items.text: Discover the UNESCO Heritage site of Baisha Village and explore its authentic heritage in an intimate way. Experience the true essence of this historical village and appreciate its cultural significance in a peaceful setting.

activities: Begin your adventure with a convenient pickup from your Lijiang hotel. First stop: Fuguo Tibetan Buddhist Temple, a secluded sanctuary where you can immerse yourself in the peaceful atmosphere of Tibetan Buddhism and discover hidden serenity.

Venture to Wenhai Wetland Nature Reserve to uncover pristine wetland biodiversity. Continue to Runangu Village for an authentic Yi cultural immersion, enjoying a delicious home-cooked lunch in the village chief's home.

Embark on an exclusive conservation patrol hike in Jade Dragon Snow Mountain Nature Reserve. End your day at Baisha Village for a traditional dinner, exploring this UNESCO heritage site in peaceful solitude before returning to your hotel.

contactNote.text: For groups of 1 person or more than 6 people

included.text: English-Speaking Guide (Lynne Lyu or Lukasz Madrzynski), Two Local Conservation Guides from Naxi and Yi Villages, Home-Cooked Lunch in Yi Village, Restaurant Dinner in Baisha, Private Transportation, Outdoor Travel Insurance.
included.notIncluded: Personal Expenses (Souvenirs, Snacks, etc.), Voluntary Gratuities for the Guides
included.meetingPoint: Pickup: 9:00 AM at your Lijiang hotel | Return: Approximately 8:00 PM to your Lijiang hotel

sections.subtitle: Click on a question to reveal the answer

items.question: What should I bring?
items.answer: We recommend comfortable hiking shoes, layers for changing temperatures, sun protection, a water bottle, and your camera.

items.question: Is this suitable for beginners?
items.answer: Yes! This is a moderate-level tour suitable for most fitness levels. You'll walk 8-9 km on mountain trails at altitudes of 2,400-3,300m.

items.question: What's the cancellation policy?
items.answer: Full refund if cancelled 7+ days before the tour. 50% refund for 3-6 days. No refund within 48 hours.

items.question: What happens if it rains?
items.answer: Most activities continue in light rain. For safety during heavy storms, we'll adjust the itinerary to indoor cultural experiences.

items.question: How do I get to the meeting point?
items.answer: We provide pickup from any hotel in Lijiang. Contact us if you need an alternative meeting point.

items.question: What language do the guides speak?
items.answer: Our guides are fluent in English. For other languages, please inquire about availability.

items.question: How does this trip support local communities?
items.answer: Each booking directly supports local Naxi and Yi communities through village homestays, local guides, and traditional meals.

items.question: What about altitude sickness?
items.answer: We ascend gradually. Our guides monitor everyone closely. If symptoms occur, we can rest and descend if needed.

title.text: Ready to Discover the Hidden Dragon?

seo.metaDescription: Escape Lijiang crowds! Discover hidden trails on our authentic ecotour to Jade Dragon Snow Mountain Nature Reserve. Hike with a ranger, explore temples, Yi villages, wetlands. Book your Yunnan adventure!
